claim: Project Telos has a thirteenth-wave formal-replay preflight package that adds a BuildLang parity witness for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet, records theorem-prover replay as blocked by missing local prover executables, demotes fresh arXiv metadata to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, writes outreach and working-paper drafts, and keeps the parent Navier-Stokes problem UNVERIFIABLE.
scope: Local thirteenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is not theorem-prover replay, not a proof of Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness, not PDE correctness, not physical-fluid validation, not source-body review of arXiv papers, not exhaustive literature coverage, not warning-clean buildc certification, and not an accepted publication.

checks.evidence: THIRTEENTH-WAVE-FORMAL-REPLAY-PREFLIGHT-2026-07-02.md exists and defines the formal-replay preflight lane.

checks.name: whitepaper draft exists
checks.evidence: FORMAL-REPLAY-PREFLIGHT-FOR-PDE-PACKETS-2026-07-02.md exists and preserves the evidence boundary.

checks.name: BuildLang parity witness exists
checks.evidence: kernel.buildlang.bld exists; buildlang-parity.receipt.json records BUILD_PARITY_MATCH with transfer below tolerance and divergence zero.

checks.name: theorem replay block exists
checks.evidence: theorem-prover-preflight records lean/lake/coqc/isabelle NOT_FOUND and verdict THEOREM_REPLAY_BLOCKED_ENVIRONMENT.

checks.name: source demotion gate exists

boundary: This packet teaches a bounded local package claim. It does not prove Navier-Stokes, theorem replay, PDE correctness, physical-fluid validity, paper truth, or publication acceptance.
